ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the geographical location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the geographical location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the geographical location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_networks" (
  "road_network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road network */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, local) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the road network */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the road network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "light_pollution_data" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image related to light measurement */,
  "exposure" INTEGER /* Total light exposure measured in the area */,
  "light_sum" REAL /* Sum of light intensity measurements */,
  "light_mean" REAL /* Mean light intensity measurement */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality metric for the data */,
  "validation_status" INTEGER /* Validation status of the data */,
  "geographical_location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the geographical_locations table */,
  "road_network_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the road_networks table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the light_pollution_data table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
column_names: Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher)
Unique identifier for each geographical location
Unique identifier for each road network
Geographical coordinates of the road network
Unique identifier for each image related to light measurement
Total light exposure measured in the area
